completeness_boundary: The full cited PDF was reviewed and searched. not_reported means that no explicit statement was found in that source.

probes.question: Does the template-free system use results from an external-literature review to refine research proposals?
Does an LLM-based evaluator select a leaf node as the root for the next experimental stage?
Does the Automated Reviewer evaluate a completed manuscript PDF and produce scores plus a preliminary accept-or-reject decision?
Were template-free outputs manually selected for submission and then assessed through an external blind workshop review process?
Does the template-free agentic-tree search rely on Aider?
Do aggregation nodes conduct new experiments?
Does the reported system currently conduct physical or wet-lab experiments?
Did humans modify the contents or execution of each selected paper's workflow from ideation through manuscript writing?
Does the source report a probabilistic calibration analysis of the template-free literature-grounded novelty assessment?
Does the source report that the terminal Automated Reviewer score changes a later node selection, experimental stage, or tree-search action?
Does the source report that external workshop reviews are fed back into the system's internal search or memory?
Does the source report an independent property-specific reliability study of the LLM evaluator that selects roots between experimental stages?
